System Capability Required: Admin can create market/global Email account with from/reply/return-path/region/configuration_set/secret_ref.
Acceptance Evidence: Email account created via backend API and visible in admin UI.
Business Value Protected: Admins can onboard Email channel without developer database edits.

System Capability Required: Readiness, verification, health check, and test-send show whether Email is safe to expose to agents.
Acceptance Evidence: Readiness JSON has no missing items; test send returns provider_message_id.
Business Value Protected: Agents cannot send from unverified/misconfigured sender.

Business Step: Expose Email to agent only when safe
System Capability Required: Capability registry marks Email ready only when runtime/account/recipient/suppression gates are closed.
Acceptance Evidence: Ticket capabilities show Email ready; missing customer email disables send with guidance.
Business Value Protected: No fake channel, no accidental unsupported outbound.

System Capability Required: Agent composer sends subject/body/to; backend creates outbox row + metadata atomically.
Acceptance Evidence: POST /outbound/send returns queued row and metadata exists.
Business Value Protected: Customer can be contacted through Email from normal ticket workflow.

System Capability Required: Worker claims Email only when enabled and dispatches through SES provider with provider_message_id.
Acceptance Evidence: Queue row becomes sent; provider_message_id stored; no OpenClaw call made.
Business Value Protected: Reliable asynchronous sending without blocking agent UI.

System Capability Required: Authenticated SES events update delivery/bounce/complaint/delay status and timeline.
Acceptance Evidence: Delivery and bounce webhook fixtures create event rows and timeline items.
Business Value Protected: Ops can see whether customer actually received or bounced.

System Capability Required: Bounce/complaint creates suppression; admin can review/deactivate with note.
Acceptance Evidence: Suppressed recipient blocks future send; deactivate requires note.

System Capability Required: Inbound parser links reply to ticket by plus-address, headers, or metadata; subject-only becomes unresolved.
Acceptance Evidence: Plus-address fixture links; subject-only fixture enters unresolved queue.
Business Value Protected: Email becomes a true two-way customer service channel.

System Capability Required: Queue summary, metrics, timeline and smoke evidence make status visible.
Acceptance Evidence: Queue summary includes Email counts; timeline displays Email lifecycle.
Business Value Protected: Operational teams can detect stuck sends, bounces, and channel health.

System Capability Required: Email-only rollback stops Email claim/dispatch without dead-lettering pending rows or affecting other channels.
Acceptance Evidence: Rollback smoke shows pending Email count unchanged and WhatsApp/WebChat unaffected.
Business Value Protected: Safe production recovery without data loss or cross-channel outage.
